name: Handgun
description:
Alongside the trademark explosive reload, the barrel fitted changes the pistol's handling:
- Bandit or Scav (side rail): Slight damage boost, but worse accuracy.
- Dahl (large front sight): Much lower recoil and faster recovery, traded for reduced damage and increased spread.
- Maliwan (finned): Better accuracy and stronger elemental damage if the gun is elemental.
- Tediore (boxy): Higher damage on Tediore weapons.
notes: Dropped at random from appropriate loot sources.
